violations.text: A drain tube from the sushi display case was observed draining into the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC stated the drain is used to drain water after cleaning. PIC removed tube during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized; ice disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

Salmon, scallops, and chicken were observed held at 44-45 degrees Fahrenheit in double-stacked pans in the prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. PIC placed cloths in sanitizer. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025
